verse_text: Thus Enoch was well-pleasing to God, and was not found, for God translated him.

links.context: As Enoch ([[GEN.5:24]]) was translated to heaven without experiencing his own death, so too was Elijah--thus making known to us that God alone has the keys of life, death, and the grave.
Though he is not named in this passage, this is a specific reference to Enoch, who was taken up to be with the Lord and made perfect ([[GEN.5:18]]-24).
